title: jasione montana proles maritima
intro: Jasione montana proles maritima, also known as Sea Lavender or Maritima, is a perennial plant species in the Campanulaceae family. It is a subspecies of the Jasione montana plant, commonly found in coastal areas and rocky outcrops. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Jasione montana proles maritima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits such as calming the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a restful sleep.
